case_title: KYLE MURPHY VS. MAACK SPA HOLLYWOOD, LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, KYLE AS TO DEFENDANT MAACK SPA HOLLYWOOD, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAACK SPA HOLLYWOOD, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $3,720.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,945.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
